profileCompliance.title: Date of birth required
profileCompliance.lead: To keep using your account we need your date of birth (minimum age 14) and your acceptance of our Privacy Policy and Terms. This is required by law and cannot be skipped.

login.lead: Compete in API challenges, climb the leaderboard, and improve your ELO.
login.leadStrong: No noise, straight to the arena.

register.lead: One account, one name, and you are in. Enter the dashboard and fight for ELO.
register.dobHint: You must be at least 14 years old to register.
register.consentBefore: I have read and accept the

errors.emailNotVerified: Email not verified. Check your inbox or request a new link on the email verification page.
errors.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters long.
errors.dobRequired: Please enter your date of birth.
errors.dobMinAge: You must be at least 14 years old to register.
errors.termsRequired: You must accept the Privacy Policy and Terms to continue.
errors.resetFailed: Could not reset password. The link may have expired.

codes.AUTH_DOB_REQUIRED: Please enter your date of birth.
codes.AUTH_DOB_PAST: Date of birth must be in the past.
codes.AUTH_AGE_MIN: You must be at least 14 years old to register.
codes.AUTH_TERMS_REQUIRED: You must accept the Privacy Policy and Terms to continue.

verifyEmail.lead: We need a verified inbox before you can sign in and submit challenges. Links expire after 48 hours —
verifyEmail.leadStrong: request a new one anytime below.
verifyEmail.badTokenHint: Request a new link below or contact support if the problem continues.
verifyEmail.idleLead: We sent a verification link to your inbox. Open it to activate your account, or resend the email if you did not receive it.
verifyEmail.resendOk: If an account exists with this email, a verification link has been sent.

forgotPassword.lead: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to set a new password. The link expires in 1 hour.
forgotPassword.sentOk: If an account exists with this email, a password reset link has been sent. Check your inbox (and spam).

resetPassword.lead: Set a new password for your account. For your security, all existing sessions will be signed out.
resetPassword.missingTokenBefore: Missing or invalid reset link. Request a new one from
resetPassword.done: Password updated. Redirecting you to sign in…
